title: Insights from global conversations
summary: We are sharing what we learned from our conversations across 22 countries, and how we will be incorporating those insights moving forward.
summaryZh: 我们正在分享我们从22个国家的对话中学到的东西，以及我们将如何将这些见解融入未来。
highlights: We are sharing what we learned from our conversations across 22 countries, and how we will be incorporating those insights moving forward.
highlightsZh: 我们正在分享我们从22个国家的对话中学到的东西，以及我们将如何将这些见解融入未来。

title: Introducing OpenAI London
summary: We are excited to announce OpenAI’s first international expansion with a new office in London, United Kingdom.
summaryZh: 我们很高兴地宣布OpenAI首次在国际上扩张，在英国伦敦设立了新办事处。
highlights: We are excited to announce OpenAI’s first international expansion with a new office in London, United Kingdom.
highlightsZh: 我们很高兴地宣布OpenAI首次在国际上扩张，在英国伦敦设立了新办事处。

title: Function calling and other API updates
summary: We’re announcing updates including more steerable API models, function calling capabilities, longer context, and lower prices.
summaryZh: 我们宣布了更新，包括更可控的API模型、函数调用功能、更长的上下文和更低的价格。
highlights: We’re announcing updates including more steerable API models, function calling capabilities, longer context, and lower prices.

title: OpenAI Cybersecurity Grant Program
summary: Our goal is to facilitate the development of AI-powered cybersecurity capabilities for defenders through grants and other support.
summaryZh: 我们的目标是通过拨款和其他支持来促进维护者基于人工智能的网络安全能力的发展。
highlights: Our goal is to facilitate the development of AI-powered cybersecurity capabilities for defenders through grants and other support.
